ddls:
CREATE TABLE "happiness_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "life_ladder" REAL /* Life ladder score representing subjective well-being */,
  "log_gdp_per_capita" REAL /* Log of GDP per capita as an economic indicator */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support score indicating societal assistance */,
  "healthy_life_expectancy" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy at birth */,
  "freedom_to_make_choices" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices score */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity score reflecting charitable behavior */,
  "perceptions_of_corruption" REAL /* Perception of corruption score */,
  "positive_affect" REAL /* Positive affect score indicating positive emotions */,
  "negative_affect" REAL /* Negative affect score indicating negative emotions */,
  "confidence_in_government" REAL /* Confidence in national government score */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_data_country_name FOREIGN KEY ("country_name") REFERENCES countries ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Official name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded data */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Asia, Europe) */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each happiness index entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID referring to the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID referring to the year */,
  "happiness_index" REAL /* Calculated happiness index value */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used to calculate the index */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset used to calculate the index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the index was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_indices_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_indices_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Life Ladder) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the metric */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data for the metric */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset for the metric */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the metric was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions assigned to the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the role was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID indicating user role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* HTTP request method used (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "request_url" TEXT /* URL of the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
